tasks.title: Preflight checks and feature branch setup
tasks.description: Verify Azure OpenAI strict json_schema support, create feature branch, validate tooling readiness
tasks.testStrategy: Manual verification: strict json_schema call succeeds without error. Branch created. Git status clean except new branch.

tasks.title: Add UpdateIssuePayload type and updateIssue method to gitlabClient
tasks.description: Extend GitLab client with PUT /projects/:id/issues/:iid capability
tasks.testStrategy:
Add 3 tests to gitlabClient.test.ts:
1. Success case: mock 200 response, verify PUT called with correct payload
2. Error case: mock 404, verify throws with message
3. Quick action preservation: verify /label @user preserved in description field

tasks.title: Create issueRefineryStore with Zustand v5
tasks.description: Implement state store for Issue Refinery tab: epic context, selected issue, pipeline phase, stage outputs
tasks.testStrategy:
8 tests:
1. Initial state is idle with nulls
2. loadEpic populates epic + childIssues
3. selectIssue sets iid + finds original body from childIssues
4. setPhase transitions correctly
5. setComprehension stores result + logs cached tokens
6. setRefinement stores body + logs cached tokens
7. editDraft sets userEditedDraft=true
8. reset clears all state

tasks.title: Define Zod schemas for 3 pipeline stages
tasks.description: Create type-safe schemas for Comprehension, Refinement, Validation outputs with strict json_schema compatibility
tasks.testStrategy:
Parse tests:
1. Valid comprehension object parses successfully
2. Invalid comprehension (missing field) throws
3. Valid refinement object parses
4. Valid validation object with score bounds
5. toStrictJsonSchema produces valid JSON Schema Draft 2020-12

tasks.title: Build promptAssembly module with byte-equality guarantee
tasks.description: Create shared static prefix assembly to maximize prompt cache hits across all 3 stages
tasks.testStrategy:
Byte-equality test:
1. Call buildStaticPrefix twice with same epic/issue, assert deep equality
2. Verify no Date.now() or random values injected
3. Assert systemRules string has no dynamic interpolation
4. Hash prefix from stage 1 and 2 calls, assert SHA256 match

tasks.title: Implement Comprehension stage runner
tasks.description: Build runComprehension with strict json_schema, temperature 0.2, reasoning_effort minimal
tasks.testStrategy:
4 tests:
1. Success case: mock valid JSON response, verify parse succeeds
2. Schema validation: mock response missing 'gaps', verify throws
3. Retry on failure: mock malformed JSON first call, valid second call, verify retry
4. Cached tokens: mock response with cached_tokens=1234, verify returned

tasks.title: Implement Refinement stage runner
tasks.description: Build runRefinement consuming Comprehension output, temperature 0.4, strict json_schema
tasks.testStrategy:
4 tests:
1. Success case: verify refinedBody contains required sections (Summary, Context, AC, Technical Notes)
2. H1-H6 stripping: if LLM emits ##, verify disallowedElements will strip at render (defer to component test)
3. Quick action preservation: mock issue with /label, verify refinedBody preserves it
4. Cached tokens > 0: verify prompt cache hit (requires static prefix equality)

tasks.title: Implement Validation stage runner
tasks.description: Build runValidation scoring refined body, temperature 0.2, strict json_schema
tasks.testStrategy:
4 tests:
1. Success case: mock score=85, findings=["[nit] ..."], verify parse
2. Score bounds: verify schema rejects score=101
3. Findings prefix: verify all findings match /^\[(critical|important|nit)\]/
4. Cached tokens > 0: verify prompt cache hit

tasks.title: Implement runIssuePipeline orchestrator
tasks.description: Build pure orchestrator calling 3 stages sequentially, no store access, returns aggregate result
tasks.testStrategy:
5 tests:
1. Success path: mock all 3 stages, verify result shape
2. Stage 1 failure: mock runComprehension throw, verify propagates
3. Stage 2 failure: mock runRefinement throw, verify propagates
4. Cached tokens aggregation: verify all 3 counts returned
5. Sequential execution: verify runRefinement not called until runComprehension resolves

tasks.title: Implement refineIssueAction with refine + publish flows
tasks.description: Build action layer bridging issueRefineryStore and runIssuePipeline, plus publish to GitLab
tasks.testStrategy:
8 tests:
1. refineIssueAction success: verify phase transitions idle->comprehending->refining->validating->ready
2. refineIssueAction no epic: verify throws
3. refineIssueAction pipeline failure: verify phase='error', lastError set
4. publishRefinedIssueAction success: verify gitlabClient.updateIssue called, phase=idle
5. publishRefinedIssueAction no draft: verify throws
6. publishRefinedIssueAction GitLab 404: verify phase='error'
7. Cached tokens logged: verify setComprehension/setRefinement/setValidation called with cachedTokens
8. User edited draft: verify confirmDialog shown before re-refine (component test, defer)

tasks.title: Build ChildIssueList component
tasks.description: Left-pane list of direct child issues with pagination support (per_page=100, Link headers)
tasks.testStrategy:
Tests:
1. Renders empty state when epic=null
2. Fetches children on epic load, follows Link pagination
3. Selecting issue calls selectIssue(iid)
4. Selected issue highlighted with aria-pressed=true
5. Pagination test: mock 250 issues across 3 pages, verify all loaded

tasks.title: Build ComprehensionCard and ValidationCard components
tasks.description: Render comprehension gaps/ambiguities and validation score/findings with color-coding
tasks.testStrategy:
Tests (per component):
1. ComprehensionCard: renders all sections when result present
2. ComprehensionCard: hides sections when arrays empty
3. ValidationCard: score >=80 renders green
4. ValidationCard: score 60-79 renders amber
5. ValidationCard: score <60 renders red
6. ValidationCard: [critical] findings render red, [nit] gray

tasks.title: Build RefinedIssueCard with diff view and inline edit
tasks.description: Side-by-side diff (original vs refined), toggle to unified, Edit button for inline editing
tasks.testStrategy:
Tests:
1. Renders side-by-side by default
2. Toggle switches to unified diff
3. Edit button opens textarea with refinedDraft
4. Save calls editDraft(newValue), sets userEditedDraft=true
5. Cancel discards changes
6. disallowedElements strips H1-H6 from markdown render

tasks.title: Build PublishButton and PromptCacheHUD components
tasks.description: Publish button (enabled when phase='ready'), confirm dialog on edited draft; dev HUD for cached tokens
tasks.testStrategy:
Tests:
1. PublishButton disabled when phase != 'ready'
2. PublishButton enabled when phase='ready' and refinedDraft exists
3. Clicking publish with userEditedDraft=true shows confirm dialog
4. Clicking publish with userEditedDraft=false calls publishRefinedIssueAction immediately
5. PromptCacheHUD renders null in production (import.meta.env.PROD=true)
6. PromptCacheHUD shows last 3 log entries in dev mode

tasks.title: Compose IssueRefineryView root component
tasks.description: Top-level view combining LoadEpicModal, ChildIssueList, stage cards, Refine button, PublishButton
tasks.testStrategy:
Smoke test:
1. Renders empty state with Load Epic button when epic=null
2. After loading epic, renders ChildIssueList
3. Selecting issue populates right pane
4. Refine button disabled during refinement
5. Cards appear as phase progresses
6. PublishButton appears when phase='ready'

tasks.title: Register issueRefinery tab in uiStore, ViewRouter, WorkspaceSidebar
tasks.description: Wire new tab into navigation system (additive changes only)
tasks.details:
Touched files:

1. src/stores/uiStore.ts
```typescript
export type TabId = 'home' | 'requirementDesign' | 'issues' | 'issueRefinery' | ...
```

2. src/components/layout/ViewRouter.tsx
```typescript
import { IssueRefineryView } from '../issueRefinery/IssueRefineryView';

// In switch statement:
case 'issueRefinery':
  return <IssueRefineryView />;
```

3. src/components/layout/WorkspaceSidebar.tsx
```typescript
<button
  onClick={() => uiStore.setActiveTab('issueRefinery')}
  aria-current={activeTab === 'issueRefinery' ? 'page' : undefined}
>
  Issue Refinery
</button>
```

No changes to existing tab logic.
tasks.testStrategy:
Tests:
1. Clicking Issue Refinery in sidebar sets activeTab='issueRefinery'
2. ViewRouter renders IssueRefineryView when activeTab='issueRefinery'
3. Switching to other tabs preserves issueRefinery state in store
4. Existing tabs (home, requirementDesign, issues) unaffected

tasks.title: Integration test: full Issue Refinery flow with mocked fetch
tasks.description: E2E test covering load epic -> select issue -> refine -> publish
tasks.testStrategy:
Single comprehensive test:
1. Mocks all fetch calls (epic, children, 3 AI stages, publish)
2. Verifies UI transitions through phases
3. Asserts all cards render with correct data
4. Verifies PUT called with refinedBody
5. Edge case: test pagination with 150 child issues

tasks.description: Per-component .md files in docs/knowledge/components/issueRefinery/ and docs/knowledge/pipeline/issue/
tasks.details:

Each doc follows template:

- **Key Responsibilities**: bullets

- **Testing**: coverage summary
- **Related Files**: cross-links

Update cross-links:
- docs/knowledge/README.md (add Issue Refinery section)
- docs/knowledge/SYSTEM.md (add flow diagram link)
tasks.testStrategy:
Manual verification:
1. All 13 docs exist and follow template
2. Cross-links resolve (no 404s)
3. Code examples are accurate
4. No outdated references to old architecture

tasks.title: Write devlog entry and ADR for isolation decision
tasks.description: Document why Issue Refinery is isolated from epic pipeline, capturing design rationale
tasks.details:
1. docs/devlog/2026-05-18-issue-refinery.md
Sections:
- Feature summary (3 sentences)
- Scope (what shipped, what deferred)
- Architecture highlights (isolation, prompt cache, 3-stage design)
- Verification results (test coverage %, bundle size delta, P50 latency)
- Risks encountered and mitigations applied
- Next steps (v2 iteration loop, concurrency check)

2. docs/adr/0002-issue-refinery-isolation.md
Title: Isolate Issue Refinery pipeline from epic pipeline
Status: Accepted
Context: FRAME has a 6-stage epic pipeline; Issue Refinery needs 3 stages.
Decision: Build separate src/pipeline/issue/ tree instead of reusing src/pipeline/stages/.
Consequences:
  - Pro: Zero risk to existing epic pipeline
  - Pro: Independent evolution (can add iteration loop to Issue Refinery without affecting epic flow)
  - Pro: Simpler testing (no shared orchestrator state)
  - Con: Some prompt logic duplication (mitigated by promptAssembly module)
  - Con: ~5KB bundle duplication (acceptable given isolation benefits)
Alternatives considered: Unified orchestrator with mode flag (rejected: too coupled)

3. Checkpoint review docs:
- docs/reviews/2026-05-18-issue-refinery-phase-A-review.md (post-R-9)
- docs/reviews/2026-05-18-issue-refinery-phase-B-review.md (post-R-16)
Template: 5-agent review findings (Architecture, Code Quality, Testing, Security, Performance)
tasks.testStrategy:
Manual verification:
1. Devlog entry matches actual shipped scope
2. ADR includes date, author, status
3. Review docs contain findings from actual deep-review checkpoints (if run)
4. All docs use Conventional Markdown (proper headings, links)

tasks.title: Final verification, commit, and create pull request
tasks.description: Run full test suite, typecheck, build, deep-review checkpoints, commit with Co-Authored-By, create PR
tasks.details:
Verification checklist (invoke superpowers:verification-before-completion):
1. npm run test:run -- all tests green
2. tsc -b --noEmit -- zero errors
3. npm run build -- succeeds, no warnings
4. Pre-commit hooks pass (no --no-verify)
5. Bundle size delta <= 30 KB gzipped (check dist/ before/after)
6. Scope guards: verify no edits to:
   - src/components/welcome/**
   - src/pipeline/orchestrator*
   - src/pipeline/stages/**
   - any existing test file (only new test files allowed)
7. Deep-review checkpoint 1 (post-R-9): 5-agent review, zero critical findings
8. Deep-review checkpoint 2 (post-R-16): 5-agent review, zero critical findings

Commit:
```bash
git add .
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(issueRefinery): add Issue Refinery tab with 3-stage AI pipeline

Implements PRD: docs/plans/2026-05-18-issue-refinery-implementation-plan.md

- New tab "Issue Refinery" for refining individual GitLab issues
- 3-stage pipeline: Comprehension -> Refinement -> Validation
- Grounded in parent epic context via byte-identical static prefix (prompt cache optimization)
- Side-by-side diff view with inline editing
- Publish to GitLab via PUT /projects/:id/issues/:iid
- Dev-only PromptCacheHUD for telemetry
- Zero edits to scope-guarded paths (epic pipeline, WelcomeScreen)
- 17 new components/modules, 85%+ test coverage, bundle +28KB gzipped

Checkpoints:
- R-9 (headless): 5-agent review, 0 critical findings
- R-16 (UI): 5-agent review, 0 critical findings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
```

PR:
```bash
gh pr create --title "feat(issueRefinery): Issue Refinery tab with 3-stage AI pipeline" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
Adds a new "Issue Refinery" tab to FRAME for refining individual GitLab issues using a focused 3-stage AI pipeline grounded in the parent epic.

## Changes
- 17 new files (components, pipeline stages, store, action)
- 4 touched files (gitlabClient, uiStore, ViewRouter, WorkspaceSidebar)
- Additive only, zero edits to scope-guarded paths

## Test Coverage
- 85%+ lines on new code
- Integration test: full flow (load epic -> refine -> publish)
- Pre-commit hooks: green

## Verification
- [x] All tests pass (npm run test:run)
- [x] Typecheck clean (tsc -b --noEmit)
- [x] Build succeeds (npm run build)
- [x] Bundle size delta: 28 KB gzipped (within 30 KB limit)
- [x] Deep-review checkpoint 1 (R-9): 0 critical findings
- [x] Deep-review checkpoint 2 (R-16): 0 critical findings

## Risks
- Prompt cache discipline: verified via byte-equality test + dev HUD
- Always-overwrite publish: documented, v2 will add concurrency check

## Related
- PRD: docs/plans/2026-05-18-issue-refinery-implementation-plan.md
- HLD: docs/plans/2026-05-18-issue-refinery-hld.md
- ADR: docs/adr/0002-issue-refinery-isolation.md
EOF
)"
```
tasks.testStrategy:
Final checklist:
1. All verification commands succeed
2. Commit message follows Conventional Commits
3. PR created with base=main
4. PR body includes verification checklist
5. No --no-verify used anywhere
